positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, celestial botanical mandala illustration. The design features intricate linework depicting stylized bioluminescent flora, crystalline structures, and cosmic elements (crescent moons, shooting stars, nebula swirls). The composition must be perfectly circular and central, enclosed by a delicate border. Style: Neo-Art Nouveau mixed with Japanese Ukiyo-e dot-work. Color Palette: Deep indigo, emerald green, gold leaf accents, and luminous turquoise. Lighting: Mystical, ethereal glow. Composition: Intricate, symmetrical, high contrast, perfect for a seamless textile print.
negative: blur, noisy, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, cropped, ugly, grayscale, jpeg artifacts, abstract noise
